title: Add a new user permission for save as a template
excerpt:

posts.author: leemurphy (Lee Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please can we add an additional permission setting to toggle the ability for users to create templates.

Within our organisation we are governing the use of standardised templates throughout the company. Currently any user can save a main board as a template, which get added to the list of templates available in an account. This becomes confusing for employees around which ones to use. We want to restrict the ability to certain user roles only to create templates.

The current workaround provided by Monday.com support is to remove the permission from all users to be able to create main boards, and only allow them to create shareable boards or private boards. This is not really a practical work around.
